note: Customer-facing category menu. kb_categories maps each menu item to kb_rules.category values used to scope the AI prompt. GENERAL RULES is always included as shared context. Labels are English master; translate via locales files. v1.1 (spec v1.5): added the per-plan manual (Pxxx). 'PLAN FILE: General Rules …' categories are shared context for payment/cancel/replace/reissue/refund/return; per-plan sheets (VOICE SIM etc.) are only reachable via Others('*') until a plan-selection step is added (backlog). Added the Nenkin/Gensen topic.

sub_questions: How do I set up APN on my phone?
My SIM has no signal
Pocket wifi won't connect to my device
How do I pay my monthly bill?
What happens if I pay late?
My signal stopped — is it because of payment?
Can I pay by bank transfer?
I lost my SIM card
I lost my pocket wifi
How much is the lost fee?

kb_categories: New Plan C and Plan SK
sub_questions: How do I cancel my plan?
Is there a cancellation fee?
When do I need to return the item?
How do I return by post?
How do I return at a convenience store?
What do I need to send back?

kb_categories: PLAN FILE: Replacement and Change Plan Rul
sub_questions: My SIM/device is broken
I want to change my plan
Is replacement free?
My signal was stopped, how do I restore it?
What is the re-issue (termination) fee?
When will I get my cashback?
How do I get my deposit back?

kb_categories: PLAN FILE: Nenkin and Gensen Rules and FAQ
sub_questions: What is the Nenkin (pension) refund?
What documents do I need?
How much is the service fee?

categories.note: Monthly prices are never answered by AI. Selecting this shows a short message and goes straight to the escalation contact card.
Opens the free-text input: 'Please tell us your question.' AI uses ALL active customer rules.
